text.title: spatial-interaction-patterns Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the spatial-interaction-patterns methodology end-to-end.

step.name: map-modalities
step.action: For each interaction, assign primary + fallback modalities. Apply primary-plus-fallback-modality rule.
step.decision-gate: Reject if any interaction has no fallback.

step.name: model-state-machines
step.action: Author state machine per interaction with idle/hover/active/cancel/error.

step.name: platform-parity-check
step.action: For each platform, confirm modality available; document divergence with justification.
